title: Assorted Colors (Black, Grey, White) Polyester & Elastane Ladies Trainer Socks, Size 4-6 (EU 37-39) Pack of 3 - Comfortable Fit, Ideal for Sports Footwear
features: ASSORTED COLOR VARIETY: These trainer socks come in a pack of 3, with each pair featuring a different color, black, grey, and white. This allows for versatility in your wardrobe as you can mix and match them with any outfit.

PREMIUM MATERIAL COMPOSITION: Our trainer socks are made with high-quality materials - 95% polyester and 5% elastane. This composition provides a soft and luxurious feel, while also allowing for breathability and flexibility.
PERFECT FIT FOR ACTIVE LADIES: Designed specifically for women’s sizes 4-6 (EU 37-39) ensuring a snug, comfortable fit that stays in place during any activity.
MULTI-PURPOSE USE: Our trainer socks are versatile and suitable for a variety of activities, whether it's running, working out, or simply going about your day-to-day tasks.
PERFECT GIFT IDEA: Looking for a practical yet stylish gift for the active woman in your life? Look no further than our ladies trainer socks pack. They are sure to be appreciated and used daily.
description: Product Description Each sock is size 4-6 (EU 37-39) and perfect for wearing with sports footwear. Safety Warning No warning applicable
